retry_reason: A put operation releases a reference; if the kref is already zero, the call is a double-put (use-after-free) and retrying would be invalid. The operation is always executed but never retried on failure.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper: releases a reference on the amdxdna_umap object by calling kref_put. If the reference count reaches zero, the release callback (amdxdna_umap_release) is invoked to free the object. After this call, the caller must not access the mapp pointer, as the object may have been freed. The caller must ensure that every previous get (or initial reference) is paired with exactly one put. This function is unconditional and always executes the put.

judge.reason: The function solely calls kref_put on the embedded reference count, delegating release to the provided callback. There is no additional logic, making it a pure put wrapper.
